Description.value: Black Wolf's better vanilla perks companion. Compensates for Bloodfall's harder progression (longer xp_to_level, raised perk costs, suppressed armor LootProb, max_level 622) by lifting Black Wolf's combat damage, survival resistances, and looter scaling by ~50% across the board. Also rewrites long descriptions with Bloodfall-flavored prose so each rank feels earned. Pure XML, loads after Black Wolf and Bloodfall.
